nasb.text: But Simon answered and said, “Pray to the Lord for me yourselves, so that nothing of what you have said may come upon me.”

esv.text: And Simon answered, “Pray for me to the Lord, that nothing of what you have said may come upon me.”

cnv.text: 西門回答：“請你們為我求主，好讓你們所說的，沒有一樣臨到我身上。”

ccb.text: 西门说：“请为我求求主，免得我遭受你们所说的刑罚。”

csbs.text: 西门回答说：“请你们为我向主祈求，使你们所说的，没有一样临到我。”
